name: Bread Furst

identity.name: Bread Furst
notes: Official Bread Furst site identifies the Van Ness neighborhood bakery; this packet is limited to the Connecticut Avenue NW location.

surfaces.title: Bread Furst Van Ness online ordering

notes: Coordinator terminal catalog derived from validated Luna research and serialized APPLY output.

attempts.query: site navigation, menu, allergen, allergy, nutrition, ingredients
attempts.outcome: No official allergen matrix or direct ingredient/allergen document found.

attempts.query: Toast menu item details and allergen/ingredient disclosures
attempts.outcome: Toast menu inspected as current linked vendor; direct item ingredient descriptions support retained positive claims, but no complete allergen matrix or cross-contact statement was found.

attempts.query: site:breadfurst.com allergen allergy nutrition ingredients Bread Furst; Bread Furst DC allergen ingredients menu
attempts.outcome: No Bread Furst official allergen matrix or official ingredient document found; unrelated third-party results excluded.
